title: Invalid Calendar Parameter in Google Calendar Node
symptom: When executing a workflow with the Google Calendar node, an error occurs stating 'Calendar parameter's value is invalid'. This prevents the workflow from functioning as intended.
not_this_if: Manually inputting the Calendar ID resolves the issue
root_cause: The error occurs because the dynamic assignment of the Calendar ID using the `$fromAI()` function does not resolve to a valid calendar ID. This can happen if the AI does not have the necessary context or access to the correct calendar IDs.
fix_steps: Provide the Calendar ID directly in the workflow or .env file
Use the expression {{ $env.CALENDAR_ID }} to load the ID dynamically
Ensure the AI has the correct context or access to calendar IDs
agent_instruction: Load the Calendar ID from your .env file using {{ $env.CALENDAR_ID }}.
